history.summary: enabled precision-agent textbook AI by default for definition-style queries, refreshed the AI panel copy, filtered noisy fallback term chips, and aligned frontend cache/version markers for reranker rollout
filtered synthetic trending queries, switched English analytics and subject graph to English-only terms, improved heatmap contrast, and refreshed runtime documentation counters
refined gaokao textbook anchors for parallel textbook editions so version-labeled refs resolve to the correct book and new chemistry/english additions can share precomputed links cleanly
added Luko chemistry and Beishida English textbook editions in parallel, version-labeled textbook titles across the site, and rebuilt page maps plus retrieval indexes for the expanded corpus
textbook classics now use curated page manifests, dictionary views show book page plus PDF page, and xuci single-character lookups prefer verified stroke-index anchors
search chat now launches browser fallback after an 8-second server head-start and tries workers.dev if the custom domain stalls; KaTeX warnings are silenced
AI chat now gives the server path a longer timeout and one retry before browser fallback; footer version text no longer appends the date
AI chat now pins the stable worker model, handles gateway HTML failures safely, removes recent searches, and folds feedback links into the footer
search related concepts now aggregate recognized matched_concepts instead of broken 2-4 character fragments
tightened graph search around local high-signal chunk evidence and simplified the About page to open-source feedback only
rewrote the About page around live runtime stats, operations boundaries, and current deployment flow
AI chat now uses precomputed gaokao analysis and textbook summaries; gaokao link panels prioritize precomputed refs before live retrieval
AI chat now expands retrieval with synonym aliases and relation hints; graph edges expose AI relation labels in tooltips
AI gateway clarified to use Worker custom domain ai.bdfz.net bound to service apis/production; docs and defaults aligned
multi-turn chat term routing, browser-fallback AI telemetry, search counts aligned to visible results
server-side grounded chat orchestration, evidence-first result badges, live stats-driven gaokao/about UI, richer gaokao AI analysis
9-page viewer window, dual-channel tags + confidence/path, AI memory chat, issue feedback entry, footer versioning
